# TopPower: Top motor power correction (+ = more

# - System automatically calculates lead angle based on velocity
# - Training data from moving shots helps refine predictions
# - Shooting from LEFT side of hub vs RIGHT side may need different corrections
# - Turret angle affects ball trajectory (shooting forward vs over shoulder)
# - Moving vs stationary shots may need different corrections
# - Ball drift during flight requires lead angle compensation
# - More similar training data = more accurate predictions
# - Training data is normalized to 12.5V reference
# - Lower voltage = automatic power boost (up to 25%)
